title: Medical device discontinuation: Auto-trak+ software option for v60 ventilators - Canada.ca
content:
## Medical device discontinuation: Auto-trak+ software option for v60 ventilators
The Auto-trak+ software option for v60 ventilators is currently reported as a medical device discontinuation under sections 62.21 to 62.26 of the Medical Devices Regulations . For a full list of shortages, refer to the list of shortages and discontinuations .
Posted date Table Footnote 1
Discontinuation status
Name of medical device Table Footnote 2 if applicable
Auto-trak+ software option for v60 ventilators

V60, auto-trak+option, quantity - 1 unit per packaging

Device identifier(s) Table Footnote 4
1076723, 1076722, 1076721

Authorization identification number, Table Footnote 5 if applicable
